shortDescription: "A control-flow graph node (other than the entry node) can have zero incoming edges"

A CFG can contain nodes (in addition to the entry node) that are not pointed to by any arrows.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A control-flow graph node (other than the entry node) can have zero incoming edges
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Except of the entry node, all control-flow graph nodes have incoming edges
